_comment: LOCAL sidebar config for Vex. Copy this file to your Vex userData folder as 'sidebar-config.json' (Windows: %APPDATA%\Vex\sidebar-config.json) and set aiNewsUrl to your personalized AI News Tracker URL. The 'personalize' query parameter is a SECRET — never commit it. sidebar-config.json is gitignored; this .example file is safe to commit. The '_comment' key is ignored by the loader.
